speaker: AGAMEMNON
text: Hark, hark, what shout is this?

speaker: DIOMEDES
text: The bruit is Hector’s slain, and by Achilles.

speaker: AJAX
text: If it be so, yet bragless let it be.

speaker: AJAX
text: Great Hector was as good a man as he.

speaker: AGAMEMNON
text: March patiently along. Let one be sent

speaker: AGAMEMNON
text: To pray Achilles see us at our tent.

speaker: AGAMEMNON
text: If in his death the gods have us befriended,

speaker: AGAMEMNON
text: Great Troy is ours, and our sharp wars are ended.
